rationale: Chemical & Bioengineering at L3 needs to be honest about the chem-eng vs. bioeng divide while reflecting their convergence in modern process biology and drug delivery. Thirty-three leaves split by process category (separations, reaction engineering, biotech), application (drug delivery, tissue engineering, environmental), and methodology (CFD, ML for process). I made tissue engineering split into scaffolds-organoids-bioprinting-organ-on-chip because each has distinct device approaches.

subfields.name: Process Design & Control
subfields.tagline: Process design, plant-wide control, advanced process control.

subfields.name: Process Optimization & Scheduling
subfields.tagline: Process optimization, supply chain optimization, scheduling at plant scale.

subfields.name: Digital Twins & ML for Process
subfields.tagline: Digital twins of plants, ML-enabled process operations, soft sensors.

subfields.name: Reactor Engineering & Design
subfields.tagline: Reactor design, multi-phase reactor modeling, scale-up of reactors.

subfields.name: Applied Catalysis Engineering
subfields.tagline: Catalyst engineering (supports, particles, performance), industrial catalysis.

subfields.name: Kinetics & Mechanism in Engineering Contexts
subfields.tagline: Reaction kinetics in engineering, microkinetic modeling, industrial mechanism studies.

subfields.name: Membrane Separations
subfields.tagline: Membrane processes, gas separation membranes, water treatment membranes.

subfields.name: Adsorption, Crystallization & Distillation
subfields.tagline: Adsorption, crystallization engineering, distillation methodology.

subfields.name: Process Intensification & Hybrid Separations
subfields.tagline: Process intensification, hybrid separation processes, reactive distillation.

subfields.name: Biopurification & Downstream Bioprocessing
subfields.tagline: Biopurification, chromatography for biopharma, downstream bioprocessing.

subfields.name: Multi-Phase & Bio-Transport Phenomena
subfields.tagline: Heat/mass transfer in chemical and biological systems, multi-phase transport.

subfields.name: Industrial Fermentation & Bioprocess Scale-Up
subfields.tagline: Industrial fermentation, bioreactor scale-up, fermentation process control.

subfields.name: Enzyme Engineering (Applied)
subfields.tagline: Enzyme engineering for industrial use, immobilization, biocatalysis bioprocess.

subfields.name: Cell Culture & Biomanufacturing
subfields.tagline: CHO/HEK cell culture engineering, perfusion, biomanufacturing for biologics.

subfields.name: Cell-Free Biomanufacturing
subfields.tagline: Cell-free biomanufacturing, in vitro synthesis, cell-free synthetic biology applied.

subfields.name: Metabolic Engineering (Applied)
subfields.tagline: Metabolic engineering for production, engineered microbial cell factories.

subfields.name: Applied Genetic Circuits & Cell Engineering
subfields.tagline: Applied genetic circuits, CRISPR for production, engineered cell therapy chassis.

subfields.name: Strain Design & Computer-Aided SynBio
subfields.tagline: Genome-scale metabolic models, computer-aided strain design, in silico SynBio.

subfields.name: LNP & mRNA Drug Delivery
subfields.tagline: Lipid nanoparticle delivery, mRNA delivery engineering, ionizable lipid design.

subfields.name: Controlled & Targeted Drug Delivery
subfields.tagline: Controlled release, targeted delivery (antibody-drug conjugates eng angle), depot systems.

subfields.name: Oral & Pulmonary Formulation
subfields.tagline: Oral biopharmaceutics, inhaled drug delivery, formulation engineering.

subfields.name: Nanocarrier Engineering for Pharma
subfields.tagline: Nanocarriers, polymeric micelles, hydrogels for delivery, dendrimer carriers.

subfields.name: Tissue Engineering Scaffolds (Engineering)
subfields.tagline: Scaffolds for bone, cartilage, vascular tissues — engineering perspective.

subfields.name: Organoids & 3D Tissue Models (Engineering)
subfields.tagline: Organoid engineering, controlled organoid culture, organoid platforms.

subfields.name: Organ-on-Chip & Microphysiological Systems
subfields.tagline: Organ-on-chip platforms, microphysiological systems, in vitro disease models eng.

subfields.name: 3D Bioprinting
subfields.tagline: 3D bioprinting of tissues, bioink development, vascularized constructs.

subfields.name: Implantable & Surgical Device Engineering
subfields.tagline: Implantable device engineering, surgical robot integration, neural implants engineering.

subfields.name: Diagnostic Device & Point-of-Care Engineering
subfields.tagline: Point-of-care diagnostics, biosensor integration, microfluidic diagnostics engineering.

subfields.name: Wastewater Treatment Process Engineering
subfields.tagline: Wastewater treatment process engineering, MBR, AOP, nutrient recovery.

subfields.name: CO2 Capture & Utilization Engineering
subfields.tagline: CO2 capture process engineering, CO2 utilization, direct air capture engineering.

subfields.name: Circular Chemistry & Sustainable Process Engineering
subfields.tagline: Circular economy in chemicals, sustainable process design, green process engineering.

subfields.name: Hydrogen, E-Fuels & Process Engineering for Fuels
subfields.tagline: Hydrogen production (electrolysis, SMR), e-fuels, biofuel process engineering.

subfields.name: CFD & ML for Chemical Engineering
subfields.tagline: CFD for chemical processes, ML for chemical engineering, multi-scale modeling in chem-eng.

uncovered_concerns: Petroleum refining engineering folded under hydrogen/fuels at L3 — small at modern publishing volumes.
Particle technology folded under reactor engineering + adsorption.
